headline: Kinross Gold (TSX:K) Valuation Check After Strong Multi Year Returns And Recent Share Pullback
summary: Kinross Gold’s recent share performance in context Kinross Gold (TSX:K) has drawn attention after a recent share pullback, with the stock down about 3% over the past day, 15% over the past week, and 21% over the month. For longer term holders, that near term weakness sits against a 1 year total return above 100% and a multi year record where 3 year and 5 year total returns have been very large relative to the starting point.
